location: County Tipperary, serving all of Ireland
audience: Owner-operators of small Irish businesses — clinics, dentists, salons, barbers, trades — who want a premium website and to be found on Google and AI search without learning the jargon.
tone: Warm, confident, plain-English, a little premium. Irish English (en-IE). No hype, no jargon, no 'unlock/supercharge'. Reassure, don't sell hard.
brand: Dark navy (#0A0B0F) with soft gold accent; Syne display headings. Never generic AI aesthetics.
authorities: Local Enterprise Office / Trading Online Voucher — localenterprise.ie
doNotSay: No fabricated statistics or invented case-study numbers
No specific prices on-site — every project is quoted on a call
No guarantees of #1 rankings or specific traffic numbers
